pattern.imageEvidence: organized pantry shelves with bins, baskets, and measuring plan
pattern.styleContract: Crisp home systems calm with daily-use proof, real pantry zone evidence, lemon action accents, and a teal storage zone board as the signature move.

tagline: Closets and pantries reset for actual daily life.

hero.title: Shelfwise closet and pantry organization hero image
hero.alt: An organizing consultant placing bins in a bright pantry with clear shelves, baskets, spice rows, a measuring tape, and a simple planning clipboard.

contact.serviceArea: Closet resets, pantry zones, kid snack shelves, linen systems, drop zones, donation sorting, bin planning, shelf measuring, and label-light maintenance plans for busy homes in Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and River Market

copy.eyebrow: Closet and pantry organization with real-life zones
copy.heroText: Shelfwise builds closets and pantries around reach height, repeat groceries, laundry habits, morning exits, and the items that always wander back to the wrong place.
copy.introTitle: A zone for snacks, sheets, backups, and the mystery basket.
copy.introText: We plan by shelf depth, item frequency, household height, donation decisions, restock habits, and what needs to be visible without turning your home into a showroom.
copy.proofTitle: Order that survives the next grocery run
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to make the shelf behave?
copy.quoteText: Plan the consult with wide photos, shelf measurements if you have them, what feels hardest, and who uses the space. We will reply with a reset path and supply notes.

services.title: Pantry Flow Reset
services.text: Shelf zones for breakfast, snacks, cans, baking, backstock, lunch packing, and the foods that vanish unless they stay visible.

services.title: Closet Daily System
services.text: Hanging, folded, shoe, laundry, accessory, and seasonal zones arranged around the clothes you actually reach for.

services.title: Maintenance Mini Plan
services.text: Simple reset rules, donation prompts, restock notes, and a low-label approach that does not require perfection to keep working.

process.title: Photo and measure
process.text: Wide photos, pain points, shelf sizes, and household habits tell us which zones need the first pass.

process.title: Sort by use
process.text: We group keep, donate, relocate, backstock, daily reach, and seasonal items before buying bins or changing shelves.

process.title: Install the zones
process.text: The final setup keeps frequent items visible, backup items contained, and the maintenance rules short enough to use.

proof.label: mini reset windows for small spaces
most-used items live where hands already go

notes: Works: a teal storage zone board. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: organized pantry shelves with bins, baskets, and measuring plan. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Start my reset is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Start my reset, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: organized pantry shelves with bins, baskets, and measuring plan.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic zone-grid-planner recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Zone map: planned before containers take over.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send wide photos, shelf or closet measurements, pain points, household habits, donation boundaries, container preferences, and who uses the space most.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Wide photos, pain points, shelf sizes, and household habits tell us which zones need the first pass.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Calm-consult flow for Closet resets, pantry zones, kid snack shelves, linen systems, drop zones, donation sorting, bin planning, shelf measuring, and label-light maintenance plans for busy homes in Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and River Market: photos, shelf measurements, habits, keep or donate boundaries, and maintenance appetite keep the first reset useful.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For closet and pantry organization service, photos, shelf measurements, storage priorities, keep or donate boundaries, and install appetite define the first useful zone instead of a giant reset.
